hypothesis: eBPF Bytecode Modification:** Insert asynchronous `bpf_prefetch` equivalent bytecode patterns (using targeted `BPF_LDX_MEM` instructions that load data into registers without immediate consumption) 16-32 instructions ahead of the actual sorting loop. This modifies the eBPF verifier-approved bytecode to act as a "memory agent," preemptively fetching the next sorting block from the eBPF map into the L1 cache before the SIMD-aligned block swap instructions execute.
